property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: startBrowser

failure.message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 150 Current browser version is 149.0.7827.103 with binary path C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe Build info: version: '3.14.0', revision: 'aacccce0', time: '2018-08-02T20:19:58.91Z' System info: host: 'DELL-MISAEL', ip: '192.168.1.65', os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: driver.version: ChromeDriver remote stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7ce8197b5+15b85] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7ce819810+15be0] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7ce335c6d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7ce37fa4d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7ce37e795] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7ce378cad] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7ce37378f] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7ce3c77e1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7ce3c7046] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7ce3830a8] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7ce383fa3] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7cedcfdf1+5cc1c1] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7cedca3aa+5c677a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7ceded205+5e95d5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7ce837dae+3417e] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7ce840acc+3ce9c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7ce823884+1fc54] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7ce823a14+1fde4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7ce805ce7+20b7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffc4428e957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffc46567c1c+2c]
